spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped layouts.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for a soft, friendly, and safe feel.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Use wide gaps (gap-8) and mixed span sizes to create visual interest. Asymmetry is preferred.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B: Control Room Grid. Tighter gaps (gap-4). Every pixel utilized, structured, clean, card-based.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and data. Center-align hero text and large marketing call-to-actions.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-blue-100 shadow-sm
surfaces.cards: Soft UI: flat white backgrounds with very subtle soft shadows (shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]) and a 1px border of border-blue-50.
surfaces.footer: Solid colored background, Primary Blue (#118AB2) with white text, providing strong contrast and closing out the page securely.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Buttons should lift up slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow. Primary buttons use a scale-105 effect on hover.

component_rules.buttons: Fully rounded (rounded-full) for primary marketing CTAs to feel pill-shaped and playful. Admin dashboard can use rounded-xl.
component_rules.inputs: Shadcn UI but with rounded-xl, light background (bg-gray-50), and no harsh dark borders. Focus state must be clearly visible.
component_rules.tables: Shadcn table for admin area. Keep rows spacious (py-4), text-sm, distinct header row background (bg-blue-50/50).
component_rules.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 2.5 for a slightly bolder, friendlier appearance.
component_rules.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts for admin dashboards. Use the primary (#118AB2) and secondary (#FFD166) colors for bars/lines.

hero_background.description: Soft yellow and blue gradient for the hero background

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the Vibrant Play archetype strictly: Use the provided Yellow (#FFD166) and Sky Blue (#118AB2) palettes. Avoid sterile, corporate vibes.
Use 'Fredoka' for all headings and 'Nunito' for body text. Headings must be bold and tightly tracked to feel youthful.
Marketing pages must use large border-radii (rounded-2xl, rounded-3xl, or rounded-full for pills/buttons) to convey friendliness.
Never use generic placeholder images. Use ONLY the URLs provided in the image_urls section for all visual content.
Build the Admin Dashboard area using customized Shadcn components with softer borders (rounded-xl), subtle shadows, and clear primary blue accents.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='enrollment-submit-btn', data-testid='nav-about').
Hero section: Overlay text properly. If using the soft abstract background, ensure high contrast for the text using the navy text color (#073B4C).
Avoid centering everything. Use bento-box asymmetric layouts for the Projects and Classes sections on the marketing site.
